assertions.description: SharedWorker is exposed on Window, including Android builds.
A same-origin blob URL can be used to construct a SharedWorker.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const url=URL.createObjectURL(new Blob(['onconnect=e=>{}'],{type:'text/javascript'}));const w=new SharedWorker(url,{name:'cps-'+Math.random()});const ok=w.port instanceof MessagePort;w.port.close();URL.revokeObjectURL(url);return ok;}catch(e){return false;}})()

assertions.description: The SharedWorker constructor requires a script URL.
SharedWorker.port can be started and closed as a MessagePort.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const url=URL.createObjectURL(new Blob(['onconnect=e=>{}'],{type:'text/javascript'}));const w=new SharedWorker(url,{name:'cps-port-'+Math.random()});w.port.start();const ok=w.port instanceof MessagePort;w.port.close();URL.revokeObjectURL(url);return ok;}catch(e){return false;}})()
